claim_bullets.bullet_text: While this useful item may be found relatively frequently in the ruins of the ancient kingdom, its communication range is limited to approximately 10 km. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256)
The effect continues as long as the item is worn. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256)
The effect of this item activates when the wearer directly looks at their target. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256)
Crystals, represented by magic stones, are items that contain magic power sealed within crystals. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256)
This item's magic intensity is 15 (magic power 8). (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256)

source_record_text: Summary of the magical item list part 2, covering item effects, crystal types, and magic intensity.
